strNotes: Sample loading order for the spiffy-mods bundle. Drop this file into your Ostranauts Mods/ folder (Options->Files in-game shows the path), alongside the mod folders. 'core' refers to the base game data and should always come first. Each entry must match a mod folder name exactly. If you already have a loading_order.json with other mods listed, merge SacksAndBuckets into your existing aLoadOrder array instead of replacing the file.
